1. **`apps/web/src/orders/types.ts`** — Order types (if needed)
2. **`apps/web/src/orders/columns.ts`** — column definitions factory

| Column     | id        | Details                                                          |
|------------|-----------|------------------------------------------------------------------|

// --- columns.ts ---
import type { Column } from "elements";
import { h } from "vue";
import type { Order, OrderStatus } from "./types";
import { Button } from "elements";

// Map each status to a human-readable label
const statusLabels: Record<OrderStatus, string> = {
  pending: "Pending",
  processing: "Processing",
  shipped: "Shipped",
  delivered: "Delivered",
  cancelled: "Cancelled",
};

// Map each status to Tailwind CSS classes for the badge
const statusClasses: Record<OrderStatus, string> = {
  pending: "bg-yellow-100 text-yellow-800",
  processing: "bg-blue-100 text-blue-800",
  shipped: "bg-purple-100 text-purple-800",
  delivered: "bg-green-100 text-green-800",
  cancelled: "bg-red-100 text-red-800",
};

// Currency formatter
const currencyFormatter = new Intl.NumberFormat("en-US", {
  style: "currency",
  currency: "USD",
});

// Date formatter
const dateFormatter = new Intl.DateTimeFormat("en-US", {
  dateStyle: "medium",
});

export interface OrderColumnHandlers {
  onView: (order: Order) => void;
  onCancel: (order: Order) => void;
}

export const createColumns = (handlers: OrderColumnHandlers): Column<Order>[] => [
  {
    id: "id",
    label: "Order",
    cell: ({ row }) => {
      const orderId = row.getValue("id") as string;
      return h("span", { class: "font-mono" }, `#${orderId}`);
    },
  },
  {
    id: "customer",
    label: "Customer",
    isSortable: true,
  },
  {
    id: "status",
    label: "Status",
    cell: ({ row }) => {
      const status = row.getValue("status") as OrderStatus;
      return h(
        "span",
        {
          class: `inline-flex items-center rounded-full px-2 py-1 text-xs font-medium ${statusClasses[status]}`,
        },
        statusLabels[status],
      );
    },
  },
  {
    id: "items",
    label: "Items",
    isSortable: true,
  },
  {
    id: "total",
    label: "Total",
    isSortable: true,
    cell: ({ row }) => {
      const amount = Number(row.getValue("total"));
      return h("div", { class: "text-right font-medium" }, currencyFormatter.format(amount));
    },
  },
  {
    id: "date",
    label: "Date",
    isSortable: true,
    cell: ({ row }) => {
      const rawDate = row.getValue("date") as string;
      return h("span", { class: "text-sm text-gray-600" }, dateFormatter.format(new Date(rawDate)));
    },
  },
  {
    id: "actions",
    cell: ({ row }) => [
      h(
        Button,
        {
          variant: "ghost",
          size: "sm",
          onClick: () => handlers.onView(row.original),
        },
        () => "View",
      ),
      h(
        Button,
        {
          variant: "destructive",
          size: "sm",
          onClick: () => handlers.onCancel(row.original),
        },
        () => "Cancel",
      ),
    ],
  },
];


// --- types.ts ---
export type OrderStatus = "pending" | "processing" | "shipped" | "delivered" | "cancelled";

export interface Order {
  id: string;
  customer: string;
  status: OrderStatus;
  items: number;
  total: number;
  date: string;
}

export interface OrderColumnHandlers {
  onView: (order: Order) => void;
  onCancel: (order: Order) => void;
}

  cancelled: { label: "Cancelled", class: "status-cancelled" },
};

  dateStyle: "medium",
});

export const createColumns = (handlers: OrderColumnHandlers): Column<Order>[] => [
  {
    id: "id",
    label: "Order",
    cell: ({ row }) => {
      const div = h("div", undefined, [
        h("span", { style: "font-family: monospace" }, `#ORD-${row.original.id}`),
      ]);
      return div;
    },
  },
  {
    id: "customer",
    label: "Customer",
    isSortable: true,
  },
  {
    id: "status",
    label: "Status",
    isSortable: true,
    cell: ({ row }) => {
      const status: OrderStatus = row.original.status;
      const config = statusMap[status];
      const span = h("span", { class: config.class }, config.label);
      return span;
    },
  },
  {
    id: "items",
    label: "Items",
    isSortable: true,
  },
  {
    id: "total",
    label: "Total",
    isSortable: true,
    cell: ({ row }) => {
      const text = totalFormatter.format(row.original.total);
      return h("span", undefined, text);
    },
  },
  {
    id: "date",
    label: "Date",
    isSortable: true,
    cell: ({ row }) => {
      const date = new Date(row.original.date);
      const text = dateFormatter.format(date);
      return h("span", undefined, text);
    },
  },
  {
    id: "actions",
    cell: ({ row }) => [
      h(
        Button,
        {
          variant: "ghost",
          size: "sm",
          onClick: () => handlers.onView(row.original),
        },
        () => "View",
      ),
      h(
        Button,
        {
          variant: "destructive",
          size: "sm",
          onClick: () => handlers.onCancel(row.original),
        },
        () => "Cancel",
      ),
    ],
  },
];

  items: number;
  total: number;
  date: string;
}

import type { Column } from "elements";
import { h } from "vue";
import type { Order, OrderStatus } from "./types";

const statusLabels: Record<OrderStatus, string> = {
  pending: "Pending",
  processing: "Processing",
  shipped: "Shipped",
  delivered: "Delivered",
  cancelled: "Cancelled",
};

const statusClasses: Record<OrderStatus, string> = {
  pending: "bg-yellow-100 text-yellow-800",
  processing: "bg-blue-100 text-blue-800",
  shipped: "bg-purple-100 text-purple-800",
  delivered: "bg-green-100 text-green-800",
  cancelled: "bg-red-100 text-red-800",
};

const priceFormatter = new Intl.NumberFormat("en-US", {
  style: "currency",
  currency: "USD",
});

const dateFormatter = new Intl.DateTimeFormat("en-US", {
  dateStyle: "medium",
});

const makeBadgeClass = (status: OrderStatus): string => {
  return "inline-flex items-center rounded-full px-2 py-1 text-xs font-medium " + statusClasses[status];
};

export const createColumns = (handlers: { onView: (order: Order) => void; onCancel: (order: Order) => void }): Column<Order>[] => [
  { id: "id", label: "Order", cell: ({ row }: any) => h("span", { class: "font-mono" }, "#ORD-" + row.original.id) },
  { id: "customer", label: "Customer", isSortable: true },
  {
    id: "status",
    label: "Status",
    cell: ({ row }: any) => {
      const status = row.getValue("status") as OrderStatus;
      return h("span", { class: makeBadgeClass(status) }, statusLabels[status]);
    },
  },
  { id: "items", label: "Items", isSortable: true },
  {
    id: "total",
    label: "Total",
    cell: ({ row }: any) => h("span", null, priceFormatter.format(row.getValue("total"))),
    isSortable: true,
  },
  {
    id: "date",
    label: "Date",
    cell: ({ row }: any) => h("span", null, dateFormatter.format(new Date(row.getValue("date")))),
    isSortable: true,
  },
  {
    id: "actions",
    label: "Actions",
    cell: ({ row }: any) => {
      const order = row.original;
      return h("div", { class: "flex gap-2" }, [
        h("button", { class: "text-sm text-gray-600 hover:text-gray-900", onClick: () => handlers.onView(order) }, "View"),
        h("button", { class: "text-sm text-red-600 hover:text-red-900", onClick: () => handlers.onCancel(order) }, "Cancel"),
      ]);
    },
  },
]);

import type { Column } from "elements"
import { Button } from "elements"
import { h } from "vue"
import type { Order, OrderStatus } from "./types"

// Per-status lookup maps for badge labels and CSS classes
const statusLabels: Record<OrderStatus, string> = {
  pending: "Pending",
  processing: "Processing",
  shipped: "Shipped",
  delivered: "Delivered",
  cancelled: "Cancelled",
}

const statusClasses: Record<OrderStatus, string> = {
  pending: "bg-yellow-100 text-yellow-800",
  processing: "bg-blue-100 text-blue-800",
  shipped: "bg-purple-100 text-purple-800",
  delivered: "bg-green-100 text-green-800",
  cancelled: "bg-red-100 text-red-800",
}

export const createColumns = (
  handlers: { onView: (order: Order) => void; onCancel: (order: Order) => void },
): Column<Order>[] => [
  {
    id: "id",
    label: "Order",
    isSortable: false,
    cell: ({ row }) => {
      const orderId = row.getValue("id") as string
      return h("span", { class: "font-mono" }, `#${orderId}`)
    },
  },
  {
    id: "customer",
    label: "Customer",
    isSortable: true,
  },
  {
    id: "status",
    label: "Status",
    cell: ({ row }) => {
      const status = row.getValue("status") as OrderStatus
      return h(
        "span",
        {
          class: `inline-flex items-center rounded-full px-2 py-1 text-xs font-medium ${statusClasses[status]}`,
        },
        statusLabels[status],
      )
    },
  },
  {
    id: "items",
    label: "Items",
    isSortable: true,
  },
  {
    id: "total",
    label: "Total",
    isSortable: true,
    cell: ({ row }) => {
      const amount = Number.parseFloat(row.getValue("total") as string)
      const formatted = new Intl.NumberFormat("en-US", {
        style: "currency",
        currency: "USD",
      }).format(amount)
      return h("div", { class: "text-right font-medium" }, formatted)
    },
  },
  {
    id: "date",
    label: "Date",
    isSortable: true,
    cell: ({ row }) => {
      const rawDate = row.getValue("date") as string
      const formatted = new Intl.DateTimeFormat("en-US", {
        dateStyle: "medium",
      }).format(new Date(rawDate))
      return h("span", { class: "text-sm text-gray-600" }, formatted)
    },
  },
  {
    id: "actions",
    label: "Actions",
    cell: ({ row }) => [
      h(
        Button,
        {
          variant: "ghost",
          size: "sm",
          onClick: () => handlers.onView(row.original),
        },
        () => "View",
      ),
      h(
        Button,
        {
          variant: "destructive",
          size: "sm",
          onClick: () => handlers.onCancel(row.original),
        },
        () => "Cancel",
      ),
    ],
  },
]
